_comment:
AI REGENERATION PROMPT - Generate the COMPLETE content for questions.json as a single valid JSON object. Include exactly 50 unique, age-appropriate questions for each of the 4 age groups (7-12, 13-20, 21-40, 41+) and for each condition (ADHD and Autism) — total 400 questions. Output the ENTIRE file content starting with { and ending with }. Use this exact structure with no extra text outside the JSON:

{
  "questions": [
    {"id": "q001", "ageGroup": "7-12", "condition": "adhd", "text": "Question here?"},
    ...
  ]
}

Requirements:
- ageGroup must be exactly: "7-12", "13-20", "21-40", or "41+"
- condition must be lowercase: "adhd" or "autism"
- Questions friendly, natural language, suitable for Yes/No/Sometimes answers
- No duplicates
- Cover key traits age-appropriately
- Make id sequential like q001, q002...
Generate the full questions.json now

questions.text: Do you find it hard to sit still in class or during meals?
